parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  id: $json.investigation_uuid,
  case_number: $json.case_number,
  title: $json.title,
  status: 'active',
  risk_score: $json.risk_index,
  total_records: $json.total_records,
  ai_context: $json.ai_context,
  records_json: JSON.stringify($json.records_json),
  timeline_json: JSON.stringify($json.timeline_json),
  geo_json: JSON.stringify($json.geo_json),
  analysis_json: JSON.stringify({
    comm_links: $json.comm_links,
    tower_analysis: $json.tower_analysis,
    common_numbers: $json.common_numbers,
    imei_mapping: $json.imei_mapping
  }),
  metadata: JSON.stringify({
    investigation_id: $json.investigation_id,
    anomalies: $json.anomalies,
    anomaly_count: $json.anomaly_count
  }),
  updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
}) }}

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  success: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.success,
  investigation_id: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.investigation_id,
  investigation_uuid: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.investigation_uuid,
  total_records: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.total_records,
  risk_index: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.risk_index,
  anomaly_count: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.anomaly_count,
  records_json: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.records_json,
  timeline_json: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.timeline_json,
  geo_json: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.geo_json,
  comm_links: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.comm_links,
  tower_analysis: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.tower_analysis,
  common_numbers: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.common_numbers,
  imei_mapping: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.imei_mapping,
  anomalies: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.anomalies
}) }}

parameters.content:
## ✅ ROUTE 1 — INGEST
Receives CDR file → Parses ALL fields (lat/long/IMEI/towers) → Saves to Supabase via HTTP (bypasses n8n Supabase node UUID issues) → Returns FULL structured data back to frontend

## 🤖 ROUTE 2 — AI QUERY
Fetches investigation from Supabase via HTTP (case_number lookup, avoids UUID mismatch) → Parses all JSON fields → Injects full dataset into Sentinel system prompt → Gemini 1.5 Pro answers

## ⚙️ REQUIRED: n8n Environment Variables
Set these in n8n → Settings → Environment Variables (or in your .env / docker-compose):

- `SUPABASE_URL` = https://xxxx.supabase.co
- `SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY` = your service_role key (NOT anon key — service key bypasses RLS)
- `GEMINI_API_KEY` = your Gemini API key (connect to the Gemini Model node credential)

⚠️ Use SERVICE_ROLE key so n8n can write without auth restrictions
